# Kiran S Baliga – Portfolio

> Backend Engineer & Full Stack Developer based in Bengaluru, India.
> Working on health technology and developer tooling.

## About

Kiran S Baliga is a Backend Engineer and Full Stack Developer with experience in backend systems, AI platforms, wearables, and SaaS products. Currently working at Ultrahuman on the Ultrahuman Ring and Ultrahuman Performance Labs — a high-tech medical diagnostics and recovery centre in Bengaluru.

## Current Role

- **Company:** Ultrahuman
- **Position:** Backend Engineer
- **Since:** 2026
- **Tech:** Ruby, Rails

## Previous Experience

- **KeyValue Software Systems** (2023–2026) — Associate Software Engineer
  - AI B2B Ads Platform (event-driven architecture, Google Spanner ORM, PDF generation, global latency)
  - Communication Rails for AI Agents (multi-agent SDK, MCP server, NPM/PyPI SDKs, CI/CD)
  - AI Powered CSM Platform (Salesforce integration, ORM optimizations)
  - E-Commerce Platform (latency optimization, caching)
  - HRTech Platform (dynamic survey engine)

- **TGH Tech** (2022) — Full Stack Developer
  - Flutter, Django, MongoDB, AWS

- **airPMO** (2020–2021) — Application Developer
  - SaaS for the construction industry, Flutter

- **IEEE CS SBC MACE** (2020–2021) — Chairperson
  - Led 20+ members, organized .hack() 24-hour hackathon (100+ participants)
  - Led chapter to become the largest IEEE CS Branch globally that year

## Skills

Backend: Ruby, Rails, Go, Python, Node.js, TypeScript
Frontend: React, Next.js, Flutter
Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Google Spanner
Cloud: AWS, GitHub Actions
Other: AI/ML, Federated Learning, MCP, OpenAI, CrewAI

## Projects

- Multi-Task Federated Learning system (privacy-preserving collaborative ML)
- CSS Animations Showcase (curated React animations)
- Trapped in Chaos (Brackey's Game Jam 2021 entry)
- Lost (maze generation puzzle game)
- Typer (1v1 typing competition)
- Where is my Mouse (HTML/CSS/JS browser game)
